octopus-salad-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Octopus Salad Recipe
instructions: Limpe os pimentos de sementes e corte-os em pequenos cubos. Descasque e pique a cebola.
Cut the boiled octopus into small pieces and put them in a bowl. Add the peppers and onion and wrap.
Tempere com o azeite, o vinagre, sal e pimenta, polvilhe com os coentros picados e volte a envolver bem. Sirva de seguida.

octopus-salad-recipe-fresh-and-light-com.name: Octopus Salad Recipe, Fresh And Light
octopus-salad-recipe-fresh-and-light-com.original_name: Receta de ensalada de pulpo, fresca y ligera

ingredients.item: 1  pulpo de entre 1 1/2 kilo a 2 kilos

instructions: To start with, you have to rinse the octopus well under the cold water group and purge it delicately.

Then the ideal thing to do is to hit the octopus with a dill or kitchen roller. That step is even more important if the octopus has been previously frozen. To start with this task, put the octopus first onto a large cutting board, or kitchen table, well clean. Be sure to pass carefully onto every space of every tentacle and of course to exclude his head.
Luego, en una olla grande, pondremos a calentar abundante agua.
When water comes to boiling point, add a handful of salt and mixture.

Now get his octopus up his head to "scare him." That's gonna get more soft. Without releasing his head, put his octopus body into his water, count to 3 and get his octopus out of his water. Repeat operation 3 or 4 times.
Luego sumerge el pulpo totalmente y agrega la hoja de laurel. Deja que el pulpo se cocine durante media hora.
Mientras el pulpo se cocina, es momento de ocuparse de los otros ingredientes. En el caso de la cebolleta, hay que limpiarla bien, escurrirla y picarla finamente, incluyendo la parte verde.
We have to do the same with parsley and put it back.
For lettuce (if you have decided to use lettuce), wash and put them back for later use.

If you decide to use the other optional vegetables, you have to leave them ready to decorate the salad as well. In the case of pimenton, it has to be clear, without seeds or vein, and we have to mingle it into thin ribbons.
En el caso de los pepinillos, hay que picarlos en rodajas delgaditas.
If you decide to use aromatic herbs, they have to be washed with advance. For example, you can use fresh basil and dill branches.
When the octopus cooking time's up, tap with a fork to see if the meat's tender enough. Otherwise, let's get ten more minutes to cook and try again if she's tender.
When the octopus's ready, put out the fire and change the place pot so that it gets cold more quickly. Let the octopus rest in the pot till at room temperature.
Then get the octopus out and scrape and put it onto a cutting plate.
Pica el pulpo en trozos de entre 2 y 3 cm. de largo.
Sazona el pulpo con pimienta al gusto, aceite de oliva al gusto y el jugo de los limones. Mezcla, y al momento de servir, espolvorea con cebollino y perejil.

If you have decided to use the other vegetables, at the time of serving the salad, make a bed with lettuce leaves and place an octopus above. Decorate with pimenton and pickle and select some leaves of aromatic herbs at the centre.
Si no vas a servir la ensalada de pulpo de inmediato, puedes conservar el pulpo en el refrigerador y sacarlo algunos minutos antes.

oeufs-cocotte-baked-eggs.name: Oeufs Cocotte (baked Eggs)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a small, lidded casserole dish with olive oil. Boil water in a kettle and set aside.

Arrange ham in the bottom of the prepared casserole dish. Sprinkle with 1 tablespoon Gruyère cheese. Pour in cream and season with black pepper. Crack eggs on top, one at a time, making sure yolks remain intact. Sprinkle with remaining 1 tablespoon Gruyère cheese and chives. Season with salt and black pepper.
Cover the casserole dish and place it into a roasting pan. Pour enough boiled water into the roasting pan so it reaches about halfway up the sides of the casserole dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 9 minutes. Uncover and continue baking until whites are just set and yolks are still runny, 3 to 6 more minutes.

okra-recipe-lezzet.name: Okra Recipe
instructions: 1. Carefully cut the stem parts of the legs in the form of cone.
2. Wash the filter.
3. Kü onion;cuk cubes in the form.
4. Peel the shells of tomato and peel the little chop.
5. Take olive oil to the pot and add tenion, add a few min roast.
6. Then cook aka&ccedil, adding tomatoes and stirring.
7. Add Bamyas to the pot and mix push to gentle.
8. Tuz, karabiber ve limon suyunu ekleyin.
9. U add hot water to the car and close the cover of the pot.
10. Bake about 20–25 minutes of bamians until soften.
11. 11. Serve the pizzeria from the stove and after a little rest.
12.  Afiyet olsun.

old-fashioned-hard-candy.name: Old-fashioned Hard Candy
instructions: Generously grease two 9-inch pans and one baking sheet.

Combine sugar, water, and corn syrup in a heavy 2 quart saucepan. Cook, stirring constantly until the sugar is dissolved; then cook without stirring, lowering the heat and cooking more slowly during the last few minutes, to the hard crack stage (149°C). If sugar crystals form on sides of pan, wipe them off with a damp brush.

Remove from heat, add oil flavoring and enough food coloring to color; stir only to mix. Pour into greased 9-inch pans. Set one pan of candy over a sauce pan containing hot water (unless you have a helper to help cut the candy). As soon as the other pan of candy is cool enough to handle, cut it with scissors into 1-inch strips. Then snip the strips into pieces. Work fast. Drop the pieces onto the buttered baking sheet. If the candy cools too quickly, set it on a saucepan over hot water to soften it, but if it gets sticky, return at once to the work counter.
Toss in a small amount of powdered sugar to keep from sticking together. Repeat with the second pan of candy.

olive-oil-cake.name: Olive Oil Cake

ingredients.item: Almond flour or meal or fine-grind cornmeal
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. plus  0.125 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: grand marnier, sweet vermouth, or other liqueur

instructions: Preheat oven to 400°. Drizzle bottom and sides of a 9" springform pan (or a 9” round cake pan with sides at least 3” high) with extra-virgin olive oil and use your fingers to coat. Line bottom with a round of parchment paper and smooth to eliminate air bubbles; coat parchment with more extra-virgin olive oil. Generously sprinkle pan with sugar and tilt to coat in an even layer; tap out excess. Whisk 2 cups (250 g) cake flour, ⅓ cup (32 g) almond flour or meal or fine-grind cornmeal, 2 tsp. baking powder, ½ tsp. baking soda, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. plus ⅛ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a medium bowl to combine and eliminate any lumps. Stir together 3 Tbsp. amaretto, Grand Marnier, sweet vermouth, or other liqueur, 3 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and 2 tsp. vanilla extract in a small bowl.

Using an electric mixer on high speed (use whisk attachment if working with a stand mixer), beat 3 large eggs, room temperature, 1 Tbsp. finely grated lemon zest, and 1 cup plus 2 Tbsp. (225 g) sugar in a large bowl until mixture is very light, thick, pale, and falls off the whisk or beaters in a slowly dissolving ribbon, about 3 minutes if using a stand mixer and about 5 minutes if using a hand mixer. With mixer still on high speed, gradually stream in 1¼ cups extra-virgin olive oil and beat until incorporated and mixture is even thicker. Reduce mixer speed to low and add dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with wet ingredients in 2 additions, beginning and ending with flour mixture. Fold batter several times with a large rubber spatula, making sure to scrape the bottom and sides of bowl. Scrape batter into prepared pan, smooth top, and sprinkle with more sugar.

Place cake in oven and immediately reduce oven temperature to 350°. Bake until top is golden brown, center is firm to the touch, and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 40–50 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack. Poke holes all over top of cake with a toothpick or skewer and drizzle with remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil; let cake cool in pan 15 minutes.

Run a thin knife around edges of cake and remove ring from pan. Slide cake onto rack and let cool completely. For the best flavor and texture, wrap cooled cake in plastic or place in an airtight container and let sit at room temperature at least a day before serving.
Do Ahead: Cake can be baked 4 days ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature. 

Editor’s note: This olive oil cake recipe was first printed in our November 2017 issue. Head this way for more of our best cake recipes →

one-pan-autumn-chicken-roast.name: One-pan Autumn Chicken Roast
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400˚F (200˚C).
On a baking sheet, toss the sweet potato, Brussels sprouts, and sliced apples so they’re evenly distributed.
Lay the chicken thighs on top.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken, fruit, and veggies and season with salt and pepper.
Sprinkle with the garlic, rosemary, and thyme.
Turn the chicken over and season on the other side, then return to skin-side up.
Bake for 30 minutes, then broil for 5-10 minutes so the chicken skin gets golden brown and crispy.
Enjoy!

one-pot-creamy-tuscan-pasta.name: One-pot Creamy Tuscan Pasta
instructions: In a large skillet, add the butter, shallot, and garlic; cook, stirring frequently, for 3-4 minutes, until softened.
Add the tomato paste, oregano, and paprika. Cook and stir for 2 minutes, or until the tomato paste starts to darken.
Add the chicken broth, milk, pasta, cherry tomatoes, and sun-dried tomatoes; season with salt and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 18-20 minutes, until the pasta is tender yet firm to the bite.
Remove from heat and stir in the spinach and Parmesan cheese until the spinach is wilted and the cheese is incorporated
If the mixture is too thick, add more milk as needed until the desired consistency is reached.
Garnish with parsley and serve hot.
Enjoy!

one-pot-spinach-chicken-pasta.name: One-pot Spinach Chicken Pasta
instructions: Boil water in a large pot over high heat.
Add 2 tablespoons of salt to water and add pasta. Cook pasta until almost al dente, or for 1-2 minutes less than the recommended cook time. Drain.
Heat 2 tablespoons olive oil in a large pot on medium heat. Add chicken, salt, and pepper. Brown chicken, making sure to cook through. Set chicken aside.
Add 2 tablespoon olive oil, garlic, and red chili flakes into the pot and stir.
Add crushed tomatoes, stirring for a few minutes.
Add cream, stirring until incorporated.
Add spinach and stir until the spinach cooks down and incorporates.
Add chicken, pasta, and parmesan, stirring until pasta is evenly coated.
Garnish with more parmesan cheese and serve!
Enjoy!

onion-dip-potato-chips.name: Onion-dip Potato Chips
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°. Grind onion powder, garlic powder, red pepper flakes, and salt in spice mill until red pepper flakes are finely ground. Transfer to a small bowl and set aside.
Spread out potato chips on a rimmed baking sheet. Bake, tossing halfway through, until deep golden brown, about 5 minutes.

Transfer potato chips to a large bowl and drizzle with oil. Sprinkle reserved spice mixture over and add two-thirds of dill. Finely zest lemon over chips. Sprinkle with lots of black pepper and toss to coat (do all this while the chips are still warm so they absorb the flavors of the spice mixture). Taste and season with more salt if needed.
Transfer chips to a platter and top with remaining dill and more black pepper.

orange-and-almond-cookies-teleculinaria.name: Orange And Almond Cookies
instructions: In a bowl, mix the almond with flour, yeast and salt. Reserve.
Apart, beat the butter with sugar for about 3 minutes. Add the yolk, the orange shard and the vanilla and continue to beat until everything is well mixed. Add the dry ingredients and beat some more.
Form a ball with the dough, wrap it in adherent film and take it to the refrigerator for 1 hour.
After this time, heat the oven at 180oC and line a board with vegetable paper. Extend the dough and cut cookies with a cutter.
Prepare the cover: place the light in one dish and the almonds rolled in another. Brush the cookies with the light and then sprinkle with the almonds. Take it in the oven for about 15 minutes.

orange-covered-cake-teleculinaria.name: Orange Covered Cake
instructions: Unte uma forma com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Ligue o forno a 170 graus.
Wash the orange, cut it into pieces with the shell, eliminate the seeds and lie in the blender. Add the sugar, eggs and oil, turn on and let it beat until you get a smooth mixture.
Transfira a massa para uma tigela, adicione a farinha e o fermento e bata bem. Deite na forma e leve ao forno durante 40 minutos. Retire, desenforme, coloque sobre uma grelha e deixe arrefecer.
However, prepare the cover: light a pot with orange juice and moreena flour, always stirring until boiling. Lie on the cake and let it cool.

Remove the thin peel from the orange (split), cut it into thin strips, lay it down for another pot, add the sugar and 1 spoon (soup) of water and bring it to the fire until you get a syrup. Remove the pot from the fire, pour the orange glass, spread over the cake and serve.

orange-cream-cake-lezzet.name: Orange Cream Cake
instructions: 1. A great recipe for orange lovers among recipes.
2. Oil the cake mold with clamp (23 cm).
3.  Un, kabartma tozu ve puding tozunu bir kaseye eleyin.
4. Add the juice of eggs, sugar, butter, orange peel and orange, and cook thoroughly with the mixer.
5. Cook the mixture for 50 minutes in the oven, which is set to 180 degrees.
6. Wait for 5 minutes from Keki oven.
7. Take on the wire grid.
8. Cover with cooking paper on it.
9. Mix the powdery sugar, labyne cheese, butter, orange juice and a teaspoon of orange peel thoroughly in a small bowl.
10. Do not plaster the cake with cream above which is well cooled, and leave to cool in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
11. 11. Decorate over orange peel and serve.

oriental-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Oriental Chicken
instructions: Put the water in the robot cup and the chicken steaks on the top tray of the steam cooker. Season the chicken with a little salt, close, fit the cup and program at steam temperature for 15 minutes at speed 1.

After that time, remove the container with the chicken and book. Put the noodles in a bowl and water them with boiling water from the glass. Let it rest for 5 minutes and then drain and reserve 80 ml of water. Also book the hot noodles.

In the clean glass, put the peeled garlic and start 5 seconds at speed 5. Add sesame oil, soy sauce, peanut butter, chilli sliced into slices, carrots and celery into small pieces, garlic in slices and chopped cilantro. Program at steam temperature for 5 minutes at reverse speed 2.

Then add the water you reserved, spinach and lime juice and repeat the schedule for another 5 minutes. Strip the chicken, join the noodles, water with the sauce and wrap it all around. Serve right away.

oven-pasta-with-onion-and-colored-pepper.name: Oven Pasta With Onion And Colored Peppers
oven-pasta-with-onion-and-colored-pepper.original_name: Onion And Colorful Pepper Oven Pasta
instructions: 1. The cake is salted in salty water.
2. Clean and clean the peppers and chop them in the form.
3. Roast the onions from piyazluk to pinkish in olive oil.
4. Add and paste peppers and butter.
5. Taste salt with pepper.
6. Mix vegetables with pasta.
7. Add fresh thyme leaves and transfer it to the oven container.
8. Pour the fried bread slices and sprinkle the pasta & wine.
9. Cook for 20 minutes in 200 degrees oven.
10. Teasing yogurt with butter.
